name: camera-scan-gate
title: Camera Scan Gate
description: A camera and QR recognition moment with a viewfinder sweep, bracket lock, confirmation pulse, and verified next beat.

variables.label: Scan color
variables.description: Any CSS color value used by the scan line and recognition glow.

variables.label: Target label
variables.description: Confirmation label revealed at recognition lock. Blank hides the line.

variables.label: Sweep speed
variables.description: Speed multiplier for the scan sweep phase only.
